result:
[[A1]]

to: Dan Marsh <info@example.com>
subject: Good to meet you at the tower

Dan,

Good to meet you at the exchange. Something you said has stuck with me: sell the experience through the agents, leave the pricing to them. We've already changed how we talk to the hotels because of it. Thanks for sharing how it's gone for you.

We're practically neighbours. Hillside Farm is just down at the foothills, at the foot of your mountain. Come out for a ride and bring the family any day you like, and I'll gladly point our visitors your way for a tasting.

Sam
